title: Perform standard calibrations
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform standard calibrations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare items for calibration

pcs.text: Select the appropriate calibration procedure for the test in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select the appropriate calibration procedure for the test in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select the appropriate calibration procedure for the test in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and use appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE), safety equipment and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and use appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE), safety equipment and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and use appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE), safety equipment and procedures.

pcs.text: Confirm all measuring equipment complies with laboratory’s specification requirements and calibration procedure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm all measuring equipment complies with laboratory’s specification requirements and calibration procedure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm all measuring equipment complies with laboratory’s specification requirements and calibration procedure.

pcs.text: Prepare reference standards and equipment for testing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare reference standards and equipment for testing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare reference standards and equipment for testing.

pcs.text: Verify performance of reference standards and measuring equipment before use and quarantine out-of-calibration items in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify performance of reference standards and measuring equipment before use and quarantine out-of-calibration items in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify performance of reference standards and measuring equipment before use and quarantine out-of-calibration items in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and minimise potential sources of measurement error
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and minimise potential sources of measurement error?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and minimise potential sources of measurement error.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare items for calibration

elements.title: Perform calibration

pcs.text: Perform individual tests without variance in accordance with the documented procedure to ensure repeatability of measurement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform individual tests without variance in accordance with the documented procedure to ensure repeatability of measurement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform individual tests without variance in accordance with the documented procedure to ensure repeatability of measurement.

pcs.text: Confirm readings are the result of a valid measurement and record data (as-found or before adjustment)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm readings are the result of a valid measurement and record data (as-found or before adjustment)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm readings are the result of a valid measurement and record data (as-found or before adjustment).

pcs.text: Adjust device under test to bring readings within specification of calibration and record data (as-left or after adjustment)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust device under test to bring readings within specification of calibration and record data (as-left or after adjustment)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust device under test to bring readings within specification of calibration and record data (as-left or after adjustment).

pcs.text: Analyse test data for trends or inconsistencies that would significantly affect the accuracy or validity of test results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse test data for trends or inconsistencies that would significantly affect the accuracy or validity of test results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse test data for trends or inconsistencies that would significantly affect the accuracy or validity of test results.

pcs.text: Repeat calibration if measurement has been compromised
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Repeat calibration if measurement has been compromised?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Repeat calibration if measurement has been compromised.

pcs.text: Seek appropriate advice when interpretation of results is outside authorised scope of approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek appropriate advice when interpretation of results is outside authorised scope of approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek appropriate advice when interpretation of results is outside authorised scope of approval.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Perform calibration

elements.title: Document results

pcs.text: Estimate and document uncertainty of measurement in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate and document uncertainty of measurement in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate and document uncertainty of measurement in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Document compliance or non-compliance with test requirements and/or specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document compliance or non-compliance with test requirements and/or specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document compliance or non-compliance with test requirements and/or specifications.

pcs.text: Record the results of each test or calibration accurately, unambiguously and objectively
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record the results of each test or calibration accurately, unambiguously and objectively?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record the results of each test or calibration accurately, unambiguously and objectively.

pcs.text: Ensure confidentiality of workplace information in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure confidentiality of workplace information in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure confidentiality of workplace information in accordance with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Document results

elements.title: Finalise calibration

pcs.text: Prepare and issue a final report detailing testing carried out, traceability, statement of compliance and relevant information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and issue a final report detailing testing carried out, traceability, statement of compliance and relevant information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and issue a final report detailing testing carried out, traceability, statement of compliance and relevant information.

pcs.text: Report any non-compliance and verify next course of action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report any non-compliance and verify next course of action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report any non-compliance and verify next course of action.

pcs.text: Attach calibration labels, equipment stickers, quality control tags and tamper-resistant seals in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Attach calibration labels, equipment stickers, quality control tags and tamper-resistant seals in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Attach calibration labels, equipment stickers, quality control tags and tamper-resistant seals in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Store test equipment, measurement standards and results in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store test equipment, measurement standards and results in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store test equipment, measurement standards and results in accordance with workplace procedures.
